title: Oracle Solaris Zone Configuration
description: Represents a complete Solaris zone configuration including global properties, resource assignments, and networking for non-global zones managed through zonecfg(8) and the RAD zonemgr module.

name.description: Unique name identifying the zone on the system

uuid.description: Universally unique identifier assigned to the zone

brand.description: Zone brand determining the runtime environment and kernel behavior

zonepath.description: File system path for the zone root directory

autoboot.description: Whether the zone should automatically boot when the global zone boots

autoshutdown.description: Action to take when the global zone is shut down

bootargs.description: Boot arguments passed to the zone at boot time

file-mac-profile.description: File MAC policy profile for mandatory access control

hostid.description: Emulated host identifier for the zone

ip-type.description: IP stack type for the zone

limitpriv.description: Comma-separated list of privileges for the zone

scheduling-class.description: Default scheduling class for processes in the zone

max-lwps.description: Maximum number of lightweight processes allowed in the zone

max-processes.description: Maximum number of processes allowed in the zone

max-shm-memory.description: Maximum shared memory allowed for the zone

max-shm-ids.description: Maximum number of shared memory identifiers

max-msg-ids.description: Maximum number of message queue identifiers

state.description: Current runtime state of the zone (read-only, not a configuration property)

id.description: Kernel-assigned zone ID when the zone is running (read-only)

anet.description: Automatic network interface resources providing network connectivity

device.description: Device resources made available to the zone

net.description: Network interface resources for shared-IP zones

dataset.description: ZFS dataset resources delegated to the zone

rctl.description: Resource control entries for the zone

admin.description: Administrative access entries for zone delegation

zpool.description: Additional ZFS pools available to the zone

smf-dependency.description: SMF service dependencies required before zone boot

AnetResource.description: Automatic network interface providing exclusive-IP networking for the zone

linkname.description: Name of the network link inside the zone

lower-link.description: Physical link over which the VNIC is created

mac-address.description: MAC address for the virtual NIC

allowed-address.description: IP address or CIDR permitted on this interface

configure-allowed-address.description: Whether to automatically configure the allowed address on the interface

link-protection.description: Link protection mode to prevent spoofing

mac-prefix.description: MAC address prefix for auto-assigned addresses

CappedCpuResource.description: CPU cap limiting the total CPU time available to the zone

ncpus.description: CPU cap expressed as a decimal number of CPUs (e.g., 1.5 = 150% of one CPU)

CappedMemoryResource.description: Memory caps limiting physical and swap memory available to the zone

DedicatedCpuResource.description: Dedicated CPU resource guaranteeing exclusive CPU access

ncpus.description: Number or range of CPUs dedicated to the zone

importance.description: Relative importance for CPU allocation when oversubscribed

VirtualCpuResource.description: Virtual CPU resource for kernel zones (solaris-kz brand only)

ncpus.description: Number or range of virtual CPUs

DeviceResource.description: Device resource allowing access to a host device from within the zone

allow-partition.description: Whether to allow access to device partitions

allow-raw-io.description: Whether to allow raw I/O access to the device

FsResource.description: File system mount providing host file system access within the zone

dir.description: Mount point directory inside the zone

special.description: Source file system path or device on the host

raw.description: Raw device path for fsck operations

NetResource.description: Network interface resource for shared-IP zones

address.description: IP address for the network interface

DatasetResource.description: ZFS dataset delegated to the zone for direct management

alias.description: Alias name for the dataset inside the zone

RctlResource.description: Resource control entry limiting system resource usage within the zone

value.description: Resource control value in the form (priv=X,limit=Y,action=Z)

AttrResource.description: Generic attribute resource for custom zone configuration properties

AdminResource.description: Administrative access entry defining who can manage the zone

user.description: User or role name granted administrative access

RootzpoolResource.description: Root ZFS pool configuration for the zone (solaris and solaris10 brands only)

storage.description: Storage URI for the root zpool

ZpoolResource.description: Additional ZFS pool available within the zone

SmfDependencyResource.description: SMF service dependency that must be satisfied before zone boot

fmri.description: Fault Management Resource Identifier of the SMF service

VerifiedBootResource.description: Verified boot settings for kernel zone security (solaris-kz brand only)

firmware.description: Firmware image path for verified boot
